pkgmetadata.longdescription: --httpsreadme42.com--[[](httpsimg.shields.iopypivvalues.svgmaxAge3600)](httpspypi.orgprojectvalues)[[](httpsimg.shields.iobadgeLicense-Unlicense-blue.svglongCacheTrue)](httpsunlicense.org) Installationbash [sudo] pip install values Examplespython import values values.get(1)[1] values.get(string)[string] values.get([1,2])[1,2] values.get(None)[]p aligncenter a hrefhttpsreadme42.comreadme42.comap
